candidates.name: fotxfilefull
candidates.purpose: t90texstk plus coordinated file-select GE480i words; checks folders/icons/text as a group.

candidates.name: fotxfileplace
candidates.purpose: t90texstk plus file-select placement/integer words only; icons/floats stay TND.

candidates.name: fotxfileicons
candidates.purpose: t90texstk plus file-select float/icon words only; text placement stays TND.

candidates.name: fotxfsg0
candidates.purpose: t90texstk plus file-select scale group 0 only, around 0x419F0-0x41A10.

candidates.name: fotxfsg1
candidates.purpose: t90texstk plus file-select scale group 1 only, around 0x41B24-0x41B34.

candidates.name: fotxfsg2
candidates.purpose: t90texstk plus file-select scale group 2 only, around 0x41C30-0x41C48.

candidates.name: fotxfsg01
candidates.purpose: t90texstk plus file-select scale groups 0 and 1, excluding group 2 which hides Select File.

candidates.name: fotxfp0g0
candidates.purpose: t90texstk plus file-select placement words and scale group 0.

candidates.name: fotxfp0g1
candidates.purpose: t90texstk plus file-select placement words and scale group 1.

candidates.name: fotxfp0g2
candidates.purpose: t90texstk plus file-select placement words and scale group 2.

candidates.name: fotxfp0g01
candidates.purpose: t90texstk plus file-select placement words and scale groups 0 and 1, excluding group 2.

candidates.name: fotxm07draw
candidates.purpose: t90texstk plus mission-select draw coordinates only; cursor/control words stay TND.

candidates.name: fotxm08draw
candidates.purpose: t90texstk plus difficulty-page draw coordinates only; cursor/control words stay TND.

candidates.name: fotxmstxt
candidates.purpose: t90texstk plus the narrow mission-select text/grid direct group only.
